2dcutecharacterspack.notes: Clean chibi characters, thick outlines. Pairs well with segel2dcharactersbundle.

7soulsrpggraphics_cavetileset.notes: Dark cave tileset. RPGMaker A/B tile layout. Pairs with dungeon tileset from same creator.

7soulsrpggraphics_dungeontileset.notes: Dungeon tileset with autotile support. Same creator/style as cave tileset.

japantileset.palette: pastel — soft pinks, blues, greens, warm tans
japantileset.notes: Cute/soft Japanese town tileset. Pastel palette stands apart from darker RPG packs. Unique aesthetic.

medievalfantasycharacters.notes: Very small pixel characters. Large variety of classes. Standard RPGMaker-scale sprites.

medievalrpgpack.notes: Quirky bird/creature-style characters with full animation sets. Slightly larger scale than medievalfantasycharacters.

medievalskillandabilityicons.render_method: digital painting, dark background with glow
medievalskillandabilityicons.palette: dark backgrounds, vibrant glowing colors, blues and teals
medievalskillandabilityicons.notes: High quality painted icons with glowing effects on dark BG. Pairs with medievaltechnologyandskillicons (same style/creator).

medievaltechnologyandskillicons.render_method: digital painting, dark background with glow
medievaltechnologyandskillicons.palette: dark backgrounds, earthy browns, blue glows
medievaltechnologyandskillicons.notes: Same creator/style as medievalskillandabilityicons. Focuses on crafting and tech skills.

outdoorandforesttileset.notes: Small pixel art. Animated chest frames. Warm earthy palette.

pixelhouseandfurnies.notes: Interior furniture and fireplace animations. Dark warm palette.

potionbottles.palette: rich warm browns, teal accent, cork tan
potionbottles.notes: Stylized cartoon potions with thick outlines. Zelda/adventure game aesthetic. Pairs with swordsandshields style.

rpgbuildingshouses.palette: brown wood, grey stone, muted medieval
rpgbuildingshouses.notes: Top-down furniture and building interiors. Same style family as rpgworlds* packs.

rpgcharacterportraits.palette: realistic skin tones, dark moody backgrounds, desaturated
rpgcharacterportraits.notes: Realistic painted character portraits. Dramatic lighting. Suited for dialogue boxes or character screens.

rpggame1700plusicons.notes: Classic 16-bit style RPG icon sheet. Massive variety. Standard RPGMaker icon format.

rpginventoryiconsv1.notes: Small pixel art inventory items. Similar scale/style to rpggame1700plusicons.

rpgitemssetv3.palette: dark backgrounds, metallic greys, reds, golds
rpgitemssetv3.notes: Painted armor/equipment icons with decorative dark border. Semi-realistic rendering. Pairs with painted icon packs.

rpgpixelweapons.notes: Dense sprite sheet of many weapon types. Very small scale. Classic 16-bit RPG feel.

rpgsurvivalcharacter.palette: warm orange/red hair, muted earth tones
rpgsurvivalcharacter.notes: Top-down survival character with full animation states. Slightly larger than RPGMaker default scale.

rpgweaponsv1.palette: realistic — dark steels, warm wood browns, metallic
rpgweaponsv1.notes: Highly detailed realistic weapon paintings. Full transparency. Best for UI/inventory at larger sizes.

rpgworldsdecorativeprops.notes: Animated flags and decorative props. Part of rpgworlds style family.

rpgworldsgrassland.palette: deep reds, dark purple bark, muted fantasy
rpgworldsgrassland.notes: Animated trees with autumn/fantasy red foliage. Cohesive with other rpgworlds* packs.

rpgworldshousesandinteriors.palette: dark wood browns, grey stone, muted
rpgworldshousesandinteriors.notes: Interior props — log piles, anvils, crates, wells, shields. Consistent with rpgworlds family.

rpgworldsmarshland.palette: very dark earthy brown, near-black, murky
rpgworldsmarshland.notes: Very dark swamp/marsh tileset. Animated bubble effects. Pairs with rpgworlds family.

rpgworldssnowylands.palette: blue-grey, white, cold tones with green pines
rpgworldssnowylands.notes: Snowy rocks, pine trees, frozen decor. Consistent rpgworlds style.

segel2dcharactersbundle.render_method: illustrated, smooth cel-shaded with thick outlines
segel2dcharactersbundle.notes: Large chibi-style characters for side-scrolling. Spriter SCML skeletal animation. Very high quality. Pairs with 2dcutecharacterspack aesthetic.

snowforesttilesets.palette: light blue, grey-white, icy cold tones
snowforesttilesets.notes: Very small pixel art. Icy chest animations. Cold/winter palette.

swordsandshields.render_method: illustrated, flat shading with bold outlines
swordsandshields.palette: deep blues, teals, steel greys, gem accents
swordsandshields.notes: Stylized cartoon weapons with bold flat shading. Not pixel art. Pairs with potionbottles aesthetic.

tropicalislandgameassets.palette: sandy tan, bright ocean blue, warm tropical
tropicalislandgameassets.notes: GDM creator. Polished RPGMaker-compatible tileset. Animated shorelines, boats, cliffs. Pairs perfectly with wintervillagegameassets (same creator).

wintervillagegameassets.palette: blue-grey, white, cold desaturated winter tones
wintervillagegameassets.notes: GDM creator. Winter village buildings, doors, animated elements. Direct sibling to tropicalislandgameassets.

Area730.palette: multiple color themes across button/panel sets
Area730.notes: Complete game UI kit. Sliced PNG components for buttons, bars, dialogs, menus, panels, sliders, loading screens. Includes AI source files.

Casual_Hit.palette: blue, red, yellow, neutral color variants
Casual_Hit.notes: Unity hit/impact VFX. 4 hit variations × 4 colors. Requires Unity for prefab usage; textures usable standalone.

FantasyBackgrounds.palette: varied per scene — icy blues, desert golds, forest greens, volcanic reds
FantasyBackgrounds.notes: 6 painted fantasy backgrounds: Arctic, Dead Sea, Desert, Forest, Volcano, Wood. Includes PSD source. Good for title screens, menus, battle arenas.

FantasyIconsMegaPack.palette: multiple color variants per icon (black, colored)
FantasyIconsMegaPack.notes: 2672+ hand-drawn icons across 13 categories. Transparent backgrounds. Multiple color variants. Covers weapons, armor, potions, gems, food, herbs, loot, magic, crafting, resources.

FantasyInventoryIcons.palette: themed color sets per variant (Knights, Samurai, Vikings, etc.)
FantasyInventoryIcons.notes: 2300+ equipment slot icons with themed variants. Includes sprite atlases, background plates, and UI frame components. Organized by slot type (armor, boots, helmets, weapons, etc.).

HeroEditor.render_method: pixel art with skeletal-style part swapping
HeroEditor.notes: Character customization system. Fantasy + Undead heroes with swappable body parts and equipment. 39 animations, 54+ WAV sounds. Includes C# scripts for inventory/shop. Multiple themed equipment sets.

RPG Unitframe #1.palette: dark fantasy — gold accents, dark backgrounds
RPG Unitframe #1.notes: Unit frame UI kit. Health/mana/energy bars, portrait frames in 3 tiers (simple, half-elite, elite), level indicators, frame masks. Includes PSD source.

Skill_Icon_Pack.palette: 7 color themes: blue, red, green, yellow, gray, emerald, violet
Skill_Icon_Pack.notes: 250+ skill/ability icons organized by color. Each color may represent a skill school or element. Includes addon/modifier icons.

Universal Sound FX.notes: 10,000+ professional mono WAV sound effects. 75+ categories: 8-bit, actions, ambiences, animals, battles, buttons, cartoon, doors, explosions, foley, impacts, magic, monsters, nature, sci-fi, UI, vehicles, weather, and more.

Tiny RPG Character Asset Pack v1.03b -Fu.render_method: pixel art, crisp tiny sprites on transparent 100x100 frames
Tiny RPG Character Asset Pack v1.03b -Fu.palette: muted fantasy tones — dark armor greys, greens, browns, bone white
Tiny RPG Character Asset Pack v1.03b -Fu.notes: 20 tiny side-view RPG characters: heroes (Knight, Archer, Wizard, Priest, Soldier, Swordsman, Lancer, Knight Templar), enemies (Orc, Armored Orc, Elite Orc, Orc Rider, Skeleton, Armored Skeleton, Greatsword Skeleton, Skeleton Archer, Slime, Werebear, Werewolf). Full animation sets (idle, walk, attack, death, hurt, block, heal). Includes shadow sprites, split VFX overlays, arrow/magic projectiles, and Aseprite sources. Side-view perspective suits battle scenes and side-scrolling combat. Pairs with HeroEditor for side-view pixel characters.

10k Game Assets.render_method: pixel art (retro/8-bit) and HD illustrated (cartoon, smooth gradients)
10k Game Assets.outline: varies — pixel outlines for retro, clean edges for HD
10k Game Assets.perspective: mixed — top-down RPG, side-scrolling platformer, flat icons, isometric
10k Game Assets.approx_resolution: pixel art: 16-64px per sprite/tile. HD: 512-1024px+ per asset
10k Game Assets.palette: pixel: limited retro palettes. HD: full color with gradients and shading
10k Game Assets.notes: 10,000+ assets from Chequered Ink spanning two incompatible visual styles. Pixel Art section (4,574 files): 8bit adventure platformer, RPG characters/tilesets, inventory icons, retro monsters, control prompts, 1-bit puzzle assets. HD Graphics section (5,114 files): platformer, UI, 3D cars, dice, icons, puzzles, cards, board games, planets, particles, monsters. Also includes 792 WAV SFX, fonts, and 35 3D vehicle models. Do NOT mix pixel and HD assets in the same project.

Game Assets(2).perspective: top-down RPG, side-view platformer, front-facing battlers
Game Assets(2).notes: 10,000+ extracted pixel art assets. Fantasy Dreamland (35 packs: grasslands, forest, desert, caves, castle, city, dungeon, village, interior tilesets + characters, bosses, enemies, icons — RPG Maker MZ format), Pixel Battlers (12 monster packs with animation states), Pixel VFX (fire/ice/light/buff spell animations), Platformer World (15 themed 16x16 platformer tilesets), Sound Effects (footsteps, game SFX, sci-fi UI — MP3/OGG/WAV). All consistent 16-bit pixel art style.

Cute RPG Music Pack 1(1).notes: 5 cute/lighthearted RPG music tracks with loopable variants. By ElvGames & Pegonthetrack. Series of 5 packs (25 total tracks). Tracks: Adorable Adventures, Dreamy Dandelion, Sunny Symphony, Treasure Island, Waddlin' Away.

Cute RPG Music Pack 2.notes: 5 cute RPG music tracks with loopable variants. Tracks: City Stroll, Dreamy Days, Fluffy Cloudtops, Magical Forest, Seaside Lunch.

Cute RPG Music Pack 3.notes: 5 cute RPG music tracks with loopable variants. Tracks: Candy Bazaar, Cool Summer, Fantasy Prelude, Jazzberry Jam, Windowsill Cat.

Cute RPG Music Pack 4.notes: 5 cute RPG music tracks with loopable variants. Tracks: Dazzling Bubbles, Otto's Shell Collection, Paw-some Stars, Sunny's Adventure, The Bear Boogie.

Cute RPG Music Pack 5.notes: 5 cute RPG music tracks with loopable variants. Tracks: Butterfly Hunt, Fireflies, In the Clouds, Spring Time, Way Back.

Epic Medieval I Music Pack.notes: 6 epic orchestral medieval/fantasy music tracks. By ElvGames & Pegonthetrack. Series of 5 packs (30 total tracks). Tracks: Clear Waters, End of the Road, Fortified, Sewage, Theme, War.

Epic Medieval II Music Pack.notes: 5 epic orchestral medieval/fantasy music tracks. Tracks: Endless Mountains, Fairy Forest, Memories, Valley Tribes, Warrior of the West.

Epic Medieval III Music Pack(1).notes: 6 epic orchestral medieval/fantasy music tracks. Includes vocal variants. Tracks: Awakening, Business As Usual, Frigg, Swords On Demand, Training Grounds, Frigg (No Vocals).

Epic Medieval IV Music Pack.notes: 6 epic orchestral medieval/fantasy music tracks. Includes vocal variants. Tracks: Endless Peace, Fields Of War, Grand Palace, Grasslands, The Horde.

Epic Medieval V Music Pack.notes: 7 epic orchestral medieval/fantasy music tracks. Includes loopable variants. Tracks: A Forgotten Tale, Battlefield, Follow The Light, Hearth Fire, Reigentanz.

Farming RPG Music Pack 1.notes: 6 pastoral/relaxing farming RPG music tracks with loopable variants. By ElvGames & Pegonthetrack. Series of 5 packs (26 total tracks). Tracks: Dragonfly, Fate, Good Morning, Seaside Promenade, Village.

Farming RPG Music Pack 2.notes: 5 pastoral/relaxing farming RPG music tracks with loopable variants. Tracks: Cosy Island, Dusk Has Fallen, Falling Leaves, Stargazing, Up At Dawn.

Farming RPG Music Pack 3.notes: 5 pastoral/relaxing farming RPG music tracks with loopable variants. Tracks: Nature's Serenity, Picnic Memories, Resting In The Hay, The Fruits Of Labour, Water Lily.

Farming RPG Music Pack 4.notes: 5 pastoral/relaxing farming RPG music tracks with loopable variants. Tracks: Fields of Tranquility, Harvest Festival, Homestead Harmony, Rise and Shine, Sunlit Meadows.

Farming RPG Music Pack 5.notes: 5 pastoral/relaxing farming RPG music tracks. Tracks: Dreams and Memories, Gramp's Still Got It, Lazy Afternoon, Moonlit Cruise, Woodland Melody.

32rogues.palette: rich varied colors, dark backgrounds, fantasy roguelike
32rogues.notes: 32x32 roguelike tileset v0.5.0 by Seth Byrd. 35 character classes, 28 monsters, 100+ items, animals, tiles, autotiles, animated tiles. Includes palette swap variants. CC0 licensed. Sprite sheets with .txt documentation per sheet.

32rogues-0.4.0.palette: rich varied colors, dark backgrounds, fantasy roguelike
32rogues-0.4.0.notes: Older version (v0.4.0) of 32rogues. Superseded by v0.5.0 which adds autotiles, animated tiles, and palette swaps. Same art style.

CHARACTER MEGAPACK.render_method: pixel art, tiny sprites on transparent background
CHARACTER MEGAPACK.palette: varied fantasy colors, clean and colorful
CHARACTER MEGAPACK.notes: 54 characters by the same creator as SLIMES/ORCS/HEROES packs. Each character has individual frame PNGs + NxM sprite strip PNGs. Level progression variants (LVL1-4) for heroes. Consistent tiny pixel art style across all characters.

SLIMES BLOBS TENTACLES.render_method: pixel art, tiny sprites on transparent background
SLIMES BLOBS TENTACLES.notes: Same creator as CHARACTER MEGAPACK, RPG HEROES ENEMIES, and Orcs Goblins V2. Slime enemies with level variants (Lvl01-Lvl02+). Individual frames + strip sheets. 4-directional attack animations.

RPG HEROES ENEMIES.render_method: pixel art, tiny sprites on transparent background
RPG HEROES ENEMIES.notes: Same creator as CHARACTER MEGAPACK. Organized by race (Humans, Orcs, Trolls, Demons, WeirdCreatures). Bonus pseudo-Gameboy monochrome style variant. Individual frames + strip sheets.

Orcs Goblins V2.render_method: pixel art, tiny sprites on transparent background
Orcs Goblins V2.notes: Same creator as CHARACTER MEGAPACK. V2 update with improved sprites. Includes older V1 for reference. Barrel goblins, regular goblins, orc warriors, orc riders.

OVERBURN AssetPack.render_method: pixel art, anti-aliased VFX on transparent background
OVERBURN AssetPack.approx_resolution: 32-96px per effect frame, sprite sheet grids
OVERBURN AssetPack.palette: 4 color themes: yellow-orange, blue, green, purple
OVERBURN AssetPack.notes: Fire/flame VFX by the same creator as ASTRONAUT and OVERSTELLAR. Sprite sheet grids (NxM format). Includes top-down and isometric orb variants at multiple sizes. PSD source files included. Bonus Mage and Flamethrower character sprites.

ASTRONAUT AssetPack.render_method: pixel art, small characters on transparent background
ASTRONAUT AssetPack.palette: 15 distinct color variants, clean bold colors
ASTRONAUT AssetPack.notes: Same creator as OVERBURN and OVERSTELLAR. Among Us-inspired astronaut characters. Full 8-directional movement with FullBody and DeadBody states. Sprite sheet grid format (e.g. 6x4, 8x1). 15 color variants ideal for multiplayer.

OVERSTELLAR AssetPack.render_method: pre-rendered rotating 3D models as pixel sprite sheets
OVERSTELLAR AssetPack.approx_resolution: 40-100px per planet/object, sprite sheet grids (16x15 typical)
OVERSTELLAR AssetPack.palette: deep space — dark backgrounds, vibrant planet/star colors
OVERSTELLAR AssetPack.notes: Same creator as OVERBURN and ASTRONAUT. Animated rotating planets (Earth-like, gas, dead, ringed, etc.), solar system replicas, suns, stars, black holes, galaxies, asteroids, meteorites, shooting stars, scrolling space backgrounds. Large sprite sheet grids for smooth rotation animation.
